CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (toDateTime('2020-01-01 00:00:00'));
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (toDateTime('2022-05-15 12:00:00'));
SELECT subDate(event_date, INTERVAL 1 YEAR) FROM test_dates;
SELECT subDate(event_date, INTERVAL 6 MONTH) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date > toDateTime('2021-01-01 00:00:00');
WITH (SELECT max(event_date) FROM test_dates) AS max_date SELECT subDate(max_date, INTERVAL 3 DAY);
CREATE TABLE nested_dates (start_date DateTime, end_date DateTime);
INSERT INTO nested_dates VALUES (toDateTime('2019-05-01 09:00:00'), toDateTime('2020-04-30 18:00:00'));
SELECT subDate(start_date, INTERVAL 2 YEAR) AS subtracted_date FROM nested_dates;
SELECT start_date, subDate(end_date, INTERVAL 10 DAY) AS new_end_date FROM nested_dates WHERE start_date < toDateTime('2020-01-01 00:00:00');
CREATE TABLE event_logs (event_time DateTime, description String);
INSERT INTO event_logs VALUES (toDateTime('2021-12-31 23:59:59'), 'Year End'), (toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00'), 'New Year');
SELECT subDate(event_time, INTERVAL 1 SECOND) AS adjusted_time, description FROM event_logs;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_logs WHERE subDate(event_time, INTERVAL 1 YEAR) < toDateTime('2022-01-01 00:00:00');
SELECT subDate(subDate(event_time, INTERVAL 1 WEEK), INTERVAL 2 DAY) AS adjusted_time FROM event_logs;
CREATE TABLE complex_dates (id UInt32, creation_date DateTime);
INSERT INTO complex_dates VALUES (1, toDateTime('2023-03-15 10:00:00'));
INSERT INTO complex_dates VALUES (2, toDateTime('2023-03-20 15:30:00'));
SELECT id, subDate(creation_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AS new_date FROM complex_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, subDate(creation_date, INTERVAL 5 HOUR) FROM complex_dates WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM complex_dates WHERE creation_date > toDateTime('2023-03-01 00:00:00'));
SELECT subDate(toDate('1999-12-31'), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS yesterday;
